summary: Resolved 3 conflicts by choosing origin/main for all files: package.json and package-lock.json use newer dependency versions with additional scripts (typecheck, scrape), and temperatures.json uses origin/main's actual temperature dataset instead of the empty array from HEAD.
strategyUsed: chose theirs (origin/main) for all 3 files - package.json has newer deps and required scrape script, package-lock.json matches the chosen package.json, temperatures.json has actual scraped data vs empty array on HEAD
